creator: lacey.leanne@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171000
portmaster build log devel/cargo

The latest cargo fails to build with on FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p4 amd64 with the following errors under portmaster and synth. Full build log attached.

Please let me know if you need further information. Thank you. =)
